headline: Release check now includes automated deploy diagnostics for core files and trust pages.
notes: Release check now runs same-origin diagnostics for version.json, robots.txt, manifest, service worker, social card asset, trust pages, and 404 availability.
Diagnostics can be rerun and copied directly from the release-check page.
Release-check markup was cleaned up so the checklist, diagnostics, and telemetry cards render as separate sections more reliably.
